summary: Program Intelligence feature testing complete. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend Playwright UI tests passed. Verified: GET /api/program/intelligence endpoint returns all 5 sections (program_health, readiness, event_effectiveness, advocacy_outcomes, support_load) with correct data types and non-empty values. UI displays all sections with proper data-testid attributes. Navigation between all 4 mode tabs works correctly. Links to Support Pod, Event Summary, and Advocacy detail pages work.
test_credentials: No auth required - mock data backend
seed_data_creation: Used existing mock data from mock_data.py, advocacy_engine.py, support_pod.py. 25 athletes, 7 events, 5 recommendations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Program Intelligence feature fully tested. Single page at /program with 5 sections. All data-testids verified: section-program-health (with health-bar, risk-callout), section-readiness (with readiness-2025/2026/2027), section-event-effectiveness (with event-eff-event_0 for Winter Showcase), section-advocacy-outcomes (with aging-recs), section-support-load (with imbalance-callout). API returns expected counts: 25 athletes, 7 events, 5 recommendations, 3 grad years. Navigation tabs work: Mission Control, Events, Advocacy, Program. Links work: stalled athletes → Support Pod, past events → Event Summary, aging recs → Advocacy detail.
mocked_api_note: All data is MOCKED (mock_data.py, program_engine.py aggregates from existing mock structures)

Response has metadata (generated_at, athlete_count, event_count, recommendation_count)
